title: CommunityBrief
description: Output of s6_synthesis.py. Structured intelligence brief ready for S7 template rendering. Every text field may only reference claims present in the input fact bundle.

classification.description: Final strategic classification. Copied from scorecard.

executive_snapshot.description: 2-4 sentence synthesis. Grounded only in verified facts. No new claims.

top_drivers.description: Top 3 dimensions driving the composite score, with one-line driver text

dimension_table.description: All 10 dimensions for full scorecard display

recommendations.description: 1-3 strategic recommendations. Mode 1: max 1. Mode 2: max 3. Mode 3: max 5.

rationale.description: Why this recommendation. Only references verified facts.

supporting_fact_ids.description: DataPoint IDs supporting this recommendation. Required for audit.

quick_reads.description: Mode 2 quick-read sections. One paragraph each.

schools_to_watch.description: Top 3 schools flagged for strategic reasons. Mode 2+.

needs_verification.description: All claims that could not be verified. Always present. May be empty.

resolution_path.description: What source or action would resolve this

impact_if_wrong.description: How much this claim affects the overall analysis

sources.description: Numbered source list. All citations in brief body use [N] references to this array.

audit_passed.description: True if s6_audit found no unfounded claims. False means audit_flags is non-empty and those claims were stripped.

audit_flags.description: Claims stripped by audit. Present only when audit_passed is false.

disclosure.description: AI usage disclosure for this document. Required on all external deliverables.
disclosure.example: Generated with Claude assistance (s3 extraction, s6 synthesis). Facts sourced from public data as noted. Human review required before external use.

data_coverage_tier.description: Copied from the S5 scorecard by s6_synthesis._inject_recommendation_gate. INSUFFICIENT means 4+ scoring dimensions defaulted to midpoint — composite is largely redistributed defaults.

recommendation_confidence_gate.description: Deterministic honesty gate injected by s6_synthesis._inject_recommendation_gate (Session 18 BLOCKER 4b). When gated is true, the brief rests on insufficient verified data and 'conduct further targeted research' is a valid, non-failure recommendation — the model must NOT manufacture confident recommendations to fill a quota.

tribal_jurisdiction_flag.description: Injected by s6_synthesis._inject_tribal_jurisdiction_flag from config/states.yaml community_metadata (Session 18 BLOCKER 5a). Charter authorization on or adjacent to tribal land may require tribal consent or fall outside state PEC jurisdiction — the scoring model does NOT account for this.

top_charter_schools.description: Charter schools in this community, injected from S3 raw data by s6_synthesis._inject_charter_intel. Directory data — bypasses S4 scoring and hallucination audit entirely. Not scored; included for operator reference only.

local_authorizers.description: Local charter authorizers serving this community, injected from S3 raw data by s6_synthesis._inject_charter_intel. Directory data — bypasses S4 scoring and hallucination audit entirely. Not scored; included for operator reference only.
